---
title: "homework_202602修正"
author: "LiuYanru"
date: "2026-05-26"
output:
    word_document:
    reference_docx: reference.docx
    number_sections: false
---


## 在RStudio中开启Rscript新文件，通过CRAN库安装tidyverse包，按照规范，写一段代码，完成查找包、安装包和查看包。

```{r}
# 1. Search for tidyverse package
help.search("tidyverse")

# 2. Install tidyverse package
#install.packages("tidyverse")

# 3. Load package
library(tidyverse)

# 4. Check package
packageVersion("tidyverse")
packageDescription("tidyverse")

help(package = "tidyverse")

tidyverse::tidyverse_packages()

ls("package:tidyverse")
ls("package:dplyr")

data(package = "tidyverse")
```

## 写一段R脚本，自定义一个函数，检查随机向量rnorm(n = 10, mean= 35, sd = 10）中的每个值是否高于阈值35（可以用for循环，也可用apply()家族）。

```{r}
x <- rnorm(n = 10, mean = 35, sd = 10)
check_threshold <- function(vec, threshold = 35){
  result <- logical(length(vec))
  for(i in 1:length(vec)){
    result[i] <- vec[i] > threshold
  }
  return(result)
}
print(x)
check_threshold(x)
```
